compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect KNOWN-ISSUES file creation
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new KNOWN-ISSUES file, template location, and onboarding changes.
**Why**: Several docs reference KNOWN-ISSUES paths or debugging workflows that will change after this epic. Keeping docs accurate ensures future agents find correct information.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update references in CLAUDE.md architecture section if needed (beyond the Common Fixes swap done in Story C), update INSTALL.md if it references the old template path, update any other docs that reference templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md
- OUT: Creating KNOWN-ISSUES content (Story A), template pipeline (Story B), Common Fixes table swap (Story C)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, no existing documentation file references `templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md`
  ← Satisfies: maintaining doc accuracy after template removal
- When this story is complete, documentation referencing the KNOWN-ISSUES file uses the correct paths (`.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` for project file, `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` for template)
  ← Satisfies: maintaining doc accuracy

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: All documentation references verified correct. No stale references to templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md found. All paths already use .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md (project) and plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md (template). No changes needed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
